name: youtube-video-script-generator
description: Generate long-form YouTube scripts, related Shorts, titles, and review/refinement notes.

interface.shortDescription: Generate long-form YouTube scripts plus related Shorts with review loops.
interface.longDescription: Creates an 8+ minute connection-focused YouTube script, 2-3 related short-form scripts, strong titles, and reviewer feedback with up to three refinement rounds.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create a YouTube script package with Shorts and review notes.
